settings.title: Settings
settings.apiKeysDescription: Add your own API key to use it instead of the default one.

chat.welcomeMessage: I'm here to help you solve problems yourself — not by giving away the answer, but by guiding you step by step. What's on your mind today?
chat.errorNoKey: No API key configured. Please contact your teacher.
chat.errorAuth: The API key is invalid. Please contact your teacher.
chat.errorRateLimit: Too many requests right now — wait a moment and try again.
chat.errorNetwork: Can't reach the server. Please check your internet connection.
chat.errorGeneric: Oops, something went wrong. Just try again!

hero.tagline: Not the answer — the path to it.

footer.tagline: AI tutoring for students — understand, don't just copy.
